tools.name: biz_generate
tools.description: Generate 3-5 business ideas based on optional sector, problem statement, or constraints. Returns structured idea briefs with problem/solution/target/hooks.

sector.description: Industry or sector (e.g. healthtech, edtech, fintech, SaaS, consumer)

problem.description: A problem or pain point to build around

constraints.description: Constraints like budget, solo founder, B2B only, no-code, etc.

tools.name: biz_validate
tools.description: Run a full viability analysis on a given idea: problem clarity, ICP, solution fit, revenue model options, market size estimate, and ICE score.

context.description: Additional context about the idea, target market, or constraints

tools.name: biz_ice_score
tools.description: Compute an ICE score (Impact 1-10, Confidence 1-10, Ease 1-10) for a business idea with rationale for each dimension.

tools.name: biz_canvas
tools.description: Generate a complete Business Model Canvas (all 9 blocks) for a saved idea slug.

idea_slug.description: Slug of the saved idea (e.g. ai-meal-planning)

tools.name: biz_pitchdeck
tools.description: Generate a 10-slide pitch deck (Problem, Solution, Market, Product, Business Model, Traction, Competition, Team, Financials, Ask) for a saved idea.

tools.name: biz_name
tools.description: Generate business name options for an idea with branding score (memorability, pronounceability, uniqueness).

style.description: Naming style: coined, descriptive, metaphor, acronym, portmanteau

tools.name: biz_name_check
tools.description: Check availability of a business name: .com domain (DNS), Twitter/X handle, Instagram handle, LinkedIn company page.

name.description: Business name to check (e.g. NutriAI, Validea)

tools.name: biz_competitors
tools.description: List direct and indirect competitors for an idea, analyze their strengths/weaknesses, and identify differentiation opportunities.

market.description: Optional market focus (e.g. US, APAC, SMB, enterprise)

tools.name: biz_financials
tools.description: Model unit economics, CAC/LTV ratio, gross margin, break-even timeline, and 12-month P&L projection.

tools.name: biz_playbook
tools.description: Generate a 30/60/90-day execution playbook with milestones, KPIs, resource requirements, and risk flags.

tools.name: biz_full_run
tools.description: Run the full end-to-end analysis pipeline: validate → canvas → competitors → financials → names → playbook. Saves all artifacts to ideas/{slug}/.

idea.description: The business idea to fully analyze

tools.name: biz_recall
tools.description: Full-text search across all stored ideas, analyses, and artifacts.

type.description: Filter by type: ideas, validations, financials, playbooks, names
